div.div: Nota sistem: public.spatial_ref_sys ialah jadual PostGIS dan RLS tidak diaktifkan menurut advisor Supabase. Rajah ini hanya mendokumenkan keadaan tersebut; tiada perubahan pangkalan data dibuat.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 2858px; height: 1px; padding-top: 3967px; margin-left: 92px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #374151;

div.div: Multiplicity: FK nullable -> 0..1 parent; FK wajib -> 1 parent; FK unik/PK -> 0..1 child; selainnya -> 0..* child.

div.div: Legenda: PK = primary key, FK = foreign key, UK = unique key; garisan putus-putus = hubungan logik tanpa FK fizikal.
